entry.title: New IDC HSFE8013D0070 awarded to ALLTECH, INC. for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00001) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 1 TO PROVIDE CONTINUED SUPPORT OF HOUSING INSPECTIONS SERVICES WHICH SUPPORT THE FEMA INDIVIDUAL HOUSING PROGRAM (IHP) BY PROVIDING FOR THE COLLECTION AND REPORTING OF INFORMATION GATHERED BY ON-SITE INSPECTION DAMAGE VERIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00002) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF UPDATE LABOR RATES PROVIDED IN ATTACHMENT 17 AT NO ADDITIONAL COST.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00004) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS ACTION IS TO EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 2 OF THIS CONTRACT FOR CONTINUED HOUSING INSPECTION SERVICES SUPPORT TO THE FEMA INDIVIDUAL HOUSING PROGRAM (IHP) BY PROVIDING CONTINUED COLLECTION AND REPORTING OF INFORMATION GATHERED BY ON-SITE INSPECTION DAMAGE VERIFICATION FOR AN ADDITIONAL YEAR.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00005) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THIS MODIFICATION WILL ADD GENERIC CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS TO THE ELECTRONIC VERSION OF THE SUBJECT CONTRACT ALLOWING FOR THE ISSUANCE OF TASK ORDERS. PLEASE NOTE, WITHOUT THIS UPDATE PRISM WOULD NOT ALLOW THE ISSUANCE OF TASK ORDERS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00006) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE STAFFING CHANGES AND RATE CHANGES TO ALLTECHS ATTACHMENT 17 OPERATIONS COST MODEL RATES

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD FAR CLAUSE 52-204-15 SERVICE CONTRACT REOUIREMENTS FOR INDEFINITE-DELIVERY CONTRACTS (JAN 2014)

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF EXERCISE OPTION YEAR 3 AND EXTEND THE PERIOD OF PERFORMANCE TO 29 SEP 2017

entry.title: IDC HSFE8013D0070 (P00009) awarded to ALLTECH, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::OT::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO FORMALLY INCORPORATE THE CONTRACT CHANGES DISCUSSED AT THE 2016 FEMA HOUSING INSPECTION SERVICES PARTNERING MEETING. THIS ACTION MODIFIES ATTACHMENT 1, 2, 15 AND 25 FOR THE SUBJECT CONTRACT. A SUMMARY OF CHANGES IS ATTACHED.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
